top_items.title: AI Coding Tools for Knowledge Work: What Executives Need to Know
top_items.one_liner: Explains why AI coding assistants like Claude Code now matter to executives, not just developers — essential briefing material.

top_items.title: Anthropic launches a multi-agent code review tool for Claude Code
top_items.one_liner: Anthropic adds multi-agent code review to Claude Code, addressing quality gaps as AI-generated code volumes surge.

top_items.title: The technical leap where most brilliant AI initiatives spectacularly fail
top_items.one_liner: Most AI initiatives stall between prototype and production — pinpoints the organisational and technical failure modes.
